meta.title: Sitting MLA and Lok Sabha affidavit trails from imported MyNeta archives
meta.source: MyNeta candidate + winner archives, anchored to ADR/sitting snapshots
meta.note: Trails merge imported candidacies/winners for a normalized name (order-insensitive; Chandra Babu→Chandrababu). Same-year asset conflicts are refused. Masked Lok Sabha winner amounts are filled from candidate profiles when available.
